244 GERS - German Studies

GERS439 Selected Topics in German Literature (3 Credits)

Special study of an author, school, genre, or theme. Taught in German. Prerequisite: GERS320, GERS321, or GERS322; or permission of ARHU- School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
